title: FastCpvp
description: Light-Weight for potatoes computers simple and good looking CrystalPvP Modpack
body:
Aw- man i can't run more than 10 mods! ugh.
No Worries!

With this modpack you can optimize and enchant your crystal pvp experience with already downloaded texture-packs and optimization!

**All Credits To The Mod Developers!**
